title: Unibond 1554715 AERO 360° Moisture Absorber Neutral Refill Tab, ultra-absorbent and odour-neutralising, for AERO 360° Dehumidifier, Condensation Absorbers, Twin Pack (2 x 450 g), Natural
features: Moisture & Odour control – The AERO 360° moisture absorber and the UniBond AERO 360 refill tabs offer a simple solution to effectively absorb excess moisture and to neutralise bad smells in your home.
2-in-1 – Patented wave-shaped UniBond refill tab to maximise air circulation combined with ultra-absorbing active crystals and patented anti-odour agents to prevent damp problems and musty smells.
Long-Lasting – One 360 dehumidifier refill tab lasts up to 3 months and is ideal for rooms up to 20m².*
Universal use – The UniBond AERO 360° damp absorber refill tabs easily fit in most humidity absorber devices with a capacity of at least 450g.

Package Contents – UniBond AERO 360° Moisture Absorber Neutral Refill Tab, for highly efficient moisture absorption, 2 x 450g Refills for the AERO 360° and most other devices with a capacity of ≥ 450g
description: Product Description Long-lasting and efficient moisture control with the UniBond AERO 360 Degree Moisture Absorber Refill Tabs! With innovative 2-in-1 technology, AERO 360 Degree odour neutraliser refill tabs absorb excess moisture and neutralise bad smells to help create a healthy indoor climate. The patented wave-shape with ultra-absorbing active crystals and patented anti-odour agents help prevent damp problems such as condensation, mould and musty smells. Best used in combination with the AERO 360 Degree Moisture Absorber to ensure long-lasting and optimal performance! This set of 2 AERO 360 Degree refill tabs is compatible with most moisture absorbers with a capacity of at least 450g. To use: push the ‘OPEN’ button on the top of the device and slide open. Open the UniBond dehumidifier refill tab packaging. Place the refill onto the open lid with the blue side facing downwards and close device. Once the tab is fully dissolved, open the spout and pour the salty solution into the toilet. Repeat the process with a new tab. The Product Benefits at a Glance: 2-in-1: controls moisture and neutralises musty smells Advanced moisture absorption with ultra-absorbent crystals Patented wave-shape design for optimal efficiency Patented** anti-odour technology Long-lasting: up to 3 months in a room of up to 20m²* Format: 2 x 450g Neutral Refill Tabs * Depending on moisture level and room temperature Safety Warning Important: do not allow the aero 360° pure tab or salty solution to come into contact with metal surfaces (gold, chrome etc.), leather, fabrics, carpets, other floor coverings or any other easily damaged surfaces. In case of contact, immediately wash with warm water. Keep out of reach of children and pets warning. Causes serious eye irritation. May be corrosive to metals. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Keep out of reach of children. Wear face protection. If in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: get medical advice/attention. Box Contains 1 x Aero 360 Humidity Absorber Refills (Pack of 2 refills) See more
